text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp begins—the prime time for
Umamusume to improve their skills.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
According to Taiki Shuttle, summer camp is an
extreme affair, with grueling training during the
day and pillow fights at night.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She talks big, convinced she'll make history as the
first sprinter to become Umamusume of the Year.
However, her words are far from empty.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two of us vow to work hand in hand to make
our stay at the camp a success.
